label: External Trigger - Subflow Helper
info:
Example flow that uses a reusable subflow for external iob-in triggering.

Inputs:
- msg.action: cached | topic | array
- msg.targetName or msg.targetId (optional)
- msg.topic for action=topic
- msg.payload (array) or msg.topics for action=array
- msg.outputMode (optional): individual | grouped

Outputs:
- Output 1: success
- Output 2: error

name: ioBroker External Trigger Helper
info:
Reusable helper for external iob-in triggering.

Selection strategy:
1) msg.targetId
2) msg.targetName
3) first compatible registered node

Actions:
- cached
- topic
- array

name: resolve + trigger
Reusable Subflow-based Triggering
info:
This flow shows how to encapsulate external triggering logic in a reusable subflow.

Set msg.action to one of:
- cached
- topic
- array

Optional target selection:
- msg.targetId
- msg.targetName

The helper emits success/error on separate outputs.
